item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · LULU
item.ns0:headline: Wilson files definitive proxy for director slate at 2026 AGM
item.description:
Wilson files definitive proxy for director slate at 2026 AGM

Dennis J. Wilson, founder of lululemon athletica inc., has launched a proxy contest to elect his slate of director candidates at the 2026 annual meeting. He issued an open letter on May 6, 2026, criticizing the company's value destruction and advocating for fresh perspectives. The definitive proxy statement and GOLD universal proxy card have been filed with the SEC.

About: lululemon athletica inc., together with its subsidiaries, designs, distributes, and retails athletic apparel and accessories for women and men. It operates in two segments, Company-Operated Stores and Direct to Consumer. The company offers pants, shorts, tops, and jackets for healthy lifestyle and athletic activities, such as yoga, running, and training, as well as other sweaty pursuits. It also provides fitness-related accessories and footwear.

  • Counterparty: Dennis J. Wilson
  • Announced: 2026-05-06

Mkt cap $14.82B · EV $21.30B · Fwd P/E 10.3x · Fwd EV/EBITDA 7.4x · EV/Sales 1.9x · Consumer Cyclical / Apparel - Retail

item.title: 💔 Busted · ODYY
item.ns0:headline: NeuRX cancels merger effective May 6; breach over BreastCheck
item.description:
NeuRX cancels merger effective May 6; breach over BreastCheck

Received a notice from NeuRX Health, Inc. cancelling the definitive agreement dated October 14, 2025, which had closed on April 21, 2026, due to NeuRX's breach of its obligations with Davion Healthcare Plc regarding the BreastCheck product. The cancellation is immediate. No financial terms or consideration were disclosed.

About: Odyssey Health, Inc., a medical company, focuses on developing medical products. It develops CardioMap, a heart monitoring and screening device; Save A Life choking rescue devices; and PRV-001 and PRV-002 neurosteroid drug compounds to treat concussions and rare brain disorders. The company was formerly known as Odyssey Group International, Inc. Odyssey Health, Inc. was founded in 2014 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.

  • Counterparty: NeuRX Health, Inc.
  • Announced: 2026-05-06

Mkt cap $5.0M · EV $4.2M · Healthcare / Medical - Devices

item.title: 📉 Delisting · Forced · LNAI
item.ns0:headline: Nasdaq staff determination April 28; seeks extension to June 1
item.description:
Nasdaq staff determination April 28; seeks extension to June 1

Received a Nasdaq staff determination letter on April 28, 2026, for non-compliance with the $35M market value of listed securities rule (MVLS Rule). The company completed a merger on May 1, 2026, issuing $20M Series B Preferred to address equity compliance, and stockholders approved a reverse stock split (1:3 to 1:30) on May 8, 2026, to regain bid price compliance. The Nasdaq Hearings Panel previously granted an exception through June 1, 2026, for bid price compliance, and the company is requesting an extension.

About: A company rebranding from Renovaro, focusing on AI-powered therapeutics and biodefense, with “Neurotoxicity Intelligence Technology” in development.

  • Announced: 2026-04-28

Mkt cap $5.8M · EV $47.7M · Healthcare / Biotechnology

Entered into a Stock Purchase Agreement with Allen Family Digital, LLC to issue 40,000,000 shares of Class A common stock at $3.00 per share for aggregate consideration of $120.0 million ($20.0 million cash and a $100.0 million secured promissory note). item.title: 🤝 Merger · CAEP
item.ns0:headline: Forward purchase with Harraden Circle for 5M shares; waives 1.5M Class B lock-up for Nasdaq
item.description:
Forward purchase with Harraden Circle for 5M shares; waives 1.5M Class B lock-up for Nasdaq

Entered into a forward purchase agreement with Harraden Circle entities for up to 5,000,000 shares to support its pending business combination with AIR Limited. The agreement provides prepayment from CAEP's trust account and includes a mechanism for share sales post-closing. Additionally, CAEP intends to waive lock-up restrictions on up to 1.5 million Class B shares held by its sponsor to comply with Nasdaq listing requirements.

About: A Cayman Islands–incorporated Special Purpose Acquisition Company (SPAC) sponsored by Cantor Fitzgerald. It raised capital to merge with or acquire companies in sectors including financial services, digital assets, healthcare, real estate services, technology, and software.

item.description:

Announced receipt of CFIUS clearance for its pending acquisition by NEC Corporation, as previously disclosed on October 29, 2025. All required regulatory approvals have now been received, clearing a key condition for the merger. The transaction is expected to close shortly, with CSG becoming a wholly owned subsidiary of NEC.

About: CSG Systems International, Inc. provides revenue management and digital monetization, customer engagement, and payment solutions primarily to the communications industry in the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Asia Pacific. It offers Advanced Convergent Platform, a private SaaS based platform; related solutions, including field force automation, analytics, electronic bill presentment, ACH, etc. to the North American cable and satellite markets.

Held a special meeting on May 7, 2026, where shareholders approved the merger agreement with M2i Global, including the issuance of shares and a name change to M2i Global, Inc. item.title: 🤝 Merger · MCR
item.ns0:headline: abrdn proposes investment grade credit policy for MMT merger; shareholder vote
item.description:
abrdn proposes investment grade credit policy for MMT merger; shareholder vote

abrdn Inc., the proposed investment adviser to MFS Multimarket Income Trust (MMT), announced its intention to propose a future policy amendment requiring an average investment grade credit quality portfolio, subject to shareholder approval. This is part of the previously announced reorganization of MFS Charter Income Trust (MCR) and MFS Intermediate High Income Fund (CIF) into MMT, which remains subject to shareholder votes. The transaction is expected to close after shareholder approvals.

About: MFS Charter Income Trust is a closed ended fixed income mutual fund launched and managed by Massachusetts Financial Services Company. The fund invests in the fixed income markets across the globe. It invests primarily in corporate bonds of U.S. or foreign issuers, U.S. Government securities, foreign government securities, mortgage-backed, and other asset-backed securities of U.S. or foreign issuers, or debt instruments of issuers located in emerging market countries.

  • Counterparty: MFS Multimarket Income Trust
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2025-12-11

About: Ernexa Therapeutics Inc., a preclinical-stage company, develops induces derived mesenchymal stem cells (iMSC) therapies for the treatment of solid tumors and autoimmune disease. It has a license agreement with Factor Bioscience Limited.

item.description:
Rights offering: 1 right/share, price at 1-5% discount to VWAP or $6.81 book

Announces a subscription rights offering to raise capital. Each shareholder of record will receive one right per share, each right exercisable for one share of common stock at a subscription price to be determined (expected to be the greater of a 1-5% discount to 30-day VWAP or $6.81 book value per share). The offering is pending SEC effectiveness of a Form S-1 registration statement.

About: The LGL Group, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the design, manufacture, and marketing of frequency and spectrum control products in the United States and internationally. The company operates through two segments, Electronic Components and Electronic Instruments. The Electronic Components segment offers clock oscillators, VCXO, TCXO OCXO, and DOCXO devices; and radio frequency, microwave and millimeter wave filters, diplexers, and solid-state power amplifiers.

  • Offer price: to be determined

item.title: 📉 Delisting · Forced · AGAE
item.ns0:headline: Nasdaq delisting for bid price, late 10-K; hearing by May 13
item.description:
Nasdaq delisting for bid price, late 10-K; hearing by May 13

Received a Nasdaq Staff Determination on May 6, 2026, that its common stock will be delisted from the Nasdaq Capital Market due to non-compliance with the minimum bid price rule (below $1.00 for 30 consecutive business days) and failure to file its Annual Report on Form 10-K for 2025. The company intends to request a hearing before an independent panel by May 13, 2026, and is considering a reverse stock split to regain compliance. Trading will continue under the ticker AGAE pending the hearing outcome.

About: Allied Gaming & Entertainment Inc. provides entertainment and gaming products worldwide. It operates esports properties to connect players and fans through a network of connected arenas; a flagship gaming arena located at the Luxor Hotel in Las Vegas, Nevada; a mobile esports truck that serves as a battleground and content generation hub; and a studio for recording and streaming gaming events. The company was formerly known as Allied Esports Entertainment Inc.

  • Announced: 2026-05-06

item.ns0:headline: UWM increases bid to $12.50 cash or 2.3328 shares; special meeting May 19
item.description:
UWM increases bid to $12.50 cash or 2.3328 shares; special meeting May 19

UWM Holdings Corporation (UWMC) increased its acquisition proposal for Two Harbors Investment Corp. (TWO) to $12.50 per share in cash or 2.3328 shares of UWMC stock, urging TWO stockholders to vote against the pending merger with CrossCountry Mortgage (CCM) at the special meeting on May 19, 2026. UWMC claims its offer is clearly superior to CCM's $12.00 per share cash deal and intends to close within approximately two months of signing an agreement. The filing includes an open letter criticizing TWO's board for refusing to engage and for prioritizing management payouts.

About: Two Harbors Investment Corp. operates as a real estate investment trust (REIT) that focuses on investing in, financing, and managing residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS), non-agency securities, mortgage servicing rights, and other financial assets in the United States. Its target assets include agency RMBS collateralized by fixed rate mortgage loans, adjustable rate mortgage loans, and hybrid adjustable-rate mortgage (ARMs); and other assets, such as financial and mortgage-related asset…

  • Counterparty: UWM Holdings Corporation
  • Offer price: $12.50 per share in cash or 2.3328 shares of UWMC stock
  • Consideration: cash or stock election
  • Announced: 2026-05-11

item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · VSCO
item.ns0:headline: Responds to BBRC proxy contest; director Naficy withdraws; AGM June 11
item.description:
Responds to BBRC proxy contest; director Naficy withdraws; AGM June 11

Filed a supplement to its definitive proxy statement and sent a letter to shareholders responding to a proxy contest by BBRC International Pte Limited and its Chairman Brett Blundy, who seek to oppose the re-election of two board members at the upcoming annual meeting on June 11, 2026. The board urges shareholders to vote for all its nominees, citing strong performance and the risks of disruption. Director Mariam Naficy has decided not to stand for re-election due to the proxy contest.

About: Victoria's Secret & Co. operates as a specialty retailer of women's intimate, personal care, and beauty products worldwide. The company offers bras, panties, lingerie, sleepwear, loungewear, and athletic attire and swimwear, as well as fragrances and body care products, and accessories under the Victoria's Secret and PINK brands. As of March 2, 2022, it operated approximately 1,400 retail stores. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is headquartered in Reynoldsburg, Ohio.

  • Counterparty: BBRC International Pte Limited

item.description:
Announced positive outcome from final pre-BLA meeting with FDA for sonelokimab (SLK) in hidradenitis suppurativa (HS). BLA submission planned for end of September 2026; acceptance and Priority Review decision expected by end of November 2026; first commercial launch targeted for H2 2027 if approved. Company also reported Q1 2026 cash of $357.9M.

MoonLake Immunotherapeutics was founded in 2021 and is headquartered in Zug, Switzerland.

item.title: 👀 Activist · BHR
item.description:
Al Shams Investments, the largest shareholder of Braemar Hotels & Resorts (BHR) with a 9.5% stake, announced its intention to seek election of new directors at the 2026 annual meeting. The activist criticizes the board's asset sale strategy, warning that further hotel divestitures could trigger a $480+ million termination payment to Ashford Inc., the external advisor controlled by Chairman Monty Bennett. Al Shams urges the independent directors to pause deal-making until shareholders elect a new board.

About: Braemar Hotels & Resorts is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on investing in luxury hotels and resorts.

  • Stake: 9.5%

item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · MFIN
item.description:
Activist group BIMIZCI Fund LLC (led by Stephen Hodges of ZimCal Asset Management) filed a definitive proxy statement to elect its slate of three Class III director nominees at Medallion Financial Corp.'s 2026 annual meeting on June 9, 2026. BIMIZCI owns 407,000 shares (4th largest institutional holder) and plans to increase its stake, citing poor financial performance, an SEC lawsuit against CEO Andrew Murstein, and governance conflicts including a $3.4 million severance obligation tied to Alvin Murstein's nomination. The activist urges stockholders to vote FOR its nominees on the BLUE proxy card.

About: Medallion Financial Corp., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a finance company in the United States. The company operates through four segments: Recreation Lending, Home Improvement Lending, Commercial Lending, and Medallion Lending. It provides loans that finance consumer purchases of recreational vehicles, boats, and trailers; consumer home improvements; commercial businesses; and taxi medallions to individuals, and small to mid-size businesses.

Announced a new $40 million share repurchase program approved by its Board on May 6, 2026, replacing the prior program. The program allows open-market, privately negotiated, or other repurchases through May 2029, with no obligation to repurchase any specific amount. The company also reported Q1 2026 results with record quarterly revenue of $151.9 million and net income of $54.0 million.

About: OppFi Inc. operates a financial technology platform that allows banks to offer lending products. Its platform facilitates the OppLoan, an installment loan product; SalaryTap, a payroll deduction secured installment loan product; and OppFi Card, a credit card product. The company is based in Chicago, Illinois.

  • Deal value: $40 million
  • Announced: 2026-05-06

This recapitalization provides shareholders with a high-cash-return security while regearing common equity.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · CNTA
item.description:
Has entered into a transaction agreement with Eli Lilly and Company for the acquisition of all Centessa shares via a court-sanctioned scheme of arrangement. Shareholders will receive $38.00 per share in cash plus contingent value rights of up to $9.00 per share. The shareholder vote is scheduled for June 12, 2026.

About: Centessa Pharmaceuticals plc, a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company, discovers, develops, and delivers medicines to patients. Its registrational pipeline products include Lixivaptan, a vasopressin V2 receptor small molecule inhibitor that is in Phase III clinical development for the treatment of autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease; and SerpinPC, an activated protein C inhibitor, which is in Phase IIa clinical development for the treatment of hemophilia A and B.

  • Counterparty: Eli Lilly and Company
  • Offer price: $38.00 per share in cash plus contingent value rights of up to $9.00 per share
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-03-31

item.title: 🤝 Merger · CONE
item.description:
This S-4/A amendment relates to the pending acquisition of Green Dot Corporation by CommerceOne Financial Corporation. Under the merger agreement, Green Dot stockholders will receive 0.2215 shares of New CommerceOne common stock and $8.11 in cash per share. The transaction also involves the sale of Green Dot's non-bank assets to an affiliate of Smith Ventures. The deal was announced on November 23, 2025, and is subject to stockholder approval and regulatory conditions.

About: CyrusOne (NASDAQ: CONE) is a premier global REIT specializing in design, construction and operation of more than 50 high-performance data centers worldwide. The Company provides mission-critical facilities that ensure the continued operation of IT infrastructure for approximately 1,000 customers, including approximately 200 Fortune 1000 companies.

  • Counterparty: CommerceOne Financial Corporation
  • Offer price: $8.11 cash plus 0.2215 shares of New CommerceOne common stock
  • Consideration: cash+stock
  • Announced: 2025-11-23

item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · GNK
item.description:
Diana Shipping Inc., a competitor holding just under 15% of Genco, has launched a proxy contest to elect its own six director nominees in support of its non-binding acquisition proposal, which the board unanimously rejected as undervaluing the company. The board recommends voting for Genco's six nominees and against Diana's proposals. The annual meeting is scheduled for June 18, 2026.

About: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the ocean transportation of dry bulk cargoes worldwide. The company owns and operates dry bulk carrier vessels to transports iron ore, coal, grains, steel products, and other dry-bulk cargoes. It charters its vessels primarily to trading houses, including commodities traders; producers; and government-owned entities.

  • Counterparty: Diana Shipping Inc.
  • Stake: ~15%
  • Announced: 2026-05-07

item.description:
Is in court-supervised receivership in Nevada's 1st Judicial District (Case No. 25 OC 00061 1B). The Receiver filed a plan of reorganization on April 20, 2026, as authorized by the court. Objections to the plan must be filed by October 10, 2026.

About: DSG Global Inc., a technology development company, engages in the design, manufacture, and marketing of fleet management solutions for the golf industry, commercial, government, and military applications worldwide. It develops, sells, and rents GPS tracking devices and interfaces for golf vehicles, and related support services. The company also offers golfer information display systems and golf carts; and programmatic advertising, and licensing and distribution services.
